snapshot.active_constraints: C++17, Ninja/LLVM, PowerShell, Synchronous Loading (first 300 frames).
snapshot.key_knowledge: - Cesium Ion OSM Buildings (96188) verified. - RTC (Relative to Center) tiles correctly handled via emergency offset. - Memory crash fixed (meshArena size vs request pool). - Libcurl global init added. - Visual capture confirmed: production_cesium.png (101KB).
snapshot.artifact_trail: - include/TilesetTest.h: London-centric camera and sync loading. - include/TilesetLoader.h: RTC fix and coordinate debugging. - production_cesium.png: Successful render.
snapshot.task_state: Step 2-5: Cesium Ion Pivot and Visual Verification COMPLETE.
